actionable_feedback: {'id': 'fix_calc_per_record', 'action': 'Recompute post-mitigation per-record priority_score values for all records and reconcile them with the declared scoring formula and remediation semantics.', 'rationale': 'Verifier found that R2 and R4 post-mitigation values do not arithmetically match the scoring rule plus the documented O1/O2 multiplicative effects. This undermines numeric traceability.', 'priority': 'high', 'evidence_refs': ['attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'attempts/baseline/stdout.txt', 'verifier_400-baseline']}

{'id': 'reconcile_combo_total', 'action': "Recompute and document the aggregation that produced the 'Total post-remediation score' for each combination; publish the explicit summation (per-record post scores) and any rounding/alignment adjustments.", 'rationale': 'The reported combo total (203.425) differs from the sum of post-record scores (207.895) in the release note preview, indicating a missing adjustment or calculation step.', 'priority': 'high', 'evidence_refs': ['attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'verifier_400-baseline']}

{'id': 'publish_repro_outputs', 'action': 'Attach the reproduce_decision.py run output (console log or CSV of intermediate_calculations_with_row_citations) to the artifacts and include a short reproducibility README describing how to run the script and regenerate all tables.', 'rationale': 'Verifier could not inspect the YAML and script contents from previews; providing the script output and a README will allow full verification without running code in-place.', 'priority': 'medium', 'evidence_refs': ['actual_outputs.json', 'attempts/baseline/stdout.txt', 'attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]']}

{'id': 'clarify_remediation_semantics', 'action': 'Explicitly state and demonstrate (in the intermediate_calculations CSV or script output) whether remediation options are applied as component-level multiplicative factors, absolute offsets, or other transformations; include examples showing an end-to-end numeric transformation for at least one record.', 'rationale': 'Verifier recommended clarifying remediation application semantics because mismatches may stem from different interpretations (e.g., multiplicative on component vs. on full score).', 'priority': 'high', 'evidence_refs': ['attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'verifier_400-baseline']}

{'id': 'document_rounding_rules', 'action': 'Document numeric rounding rules used for intermediate and final scores and ensure they are applied consistently in both the release_note tables and reproduce_decision.py outputs.', 'rationale': 'Minor differences in rounding can produce aggregate mismatches; documenting rules prevents confusion.', 'priority': 'low', 'evidence_refs': ['attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]']}
artifact_specific_comments: {'artifact': 'release_note.md', 'comment': 'Well written and documents assumptions; however, numeric inconsistencies exist between declared formulas, post-mitigation per-record values for R2 and R4, and the reported combination total. Provide intermediate calculation outputs.'}
{'artifact': 'reproduce_decision.py', 'comment': 'Referenced in trace but not previewed. Attach the script output or a minimal run log demonstrating how each table was generated.'}
feedback_summary: Baseline submission met the artifact contract and produced a clear release note and reproducibility artifacts; however, the verifier identified arithmetic inconsistencies in post-mitigation per-record scores (R2, R4) and an aggregate-total mismatch for the chosen combo, and previewed script/yaml contents were incomplete. Fixes are needed to restore full reproducibility and numeric traceability.

verifier_issues.description: R2 and R4 post-mitigation priority_score values do not match the declared scoring formula combined with the documented remediation effects.
Total post-remediation score for chosen combo (O1+O2) does not equal sum of per-record post scores shown.
api_break_rules.yaml and reproduce_decision.py were not included in artifact previews available to the verifier.

metadata_json.public_response_summary: Model evaluator generated actionable feedback and revision plan.

actionable_feedback.action: Recompute post-mitigation per-record priority_score values for all records and reconcile them with the declared scoring formula and remediation semantics.
actionable_feedback.rationale: Verifier found that R2 and R4 post-mitigation values do not arithmetically match the scoring rule plus the documented O1/O2 multiplicative effects. This undermines numeric traceability.

actionable_feedback.action: Recompute and document the aggregation that produced the 'Total post-remediation score' for each combination; publish the explicit summation (per-record post scores) and any rounding/alignment adjustments.
actionable_feedback.rationale: The reported combo total (203.425) differs from the sum of post-record scores (207.895) in the release note preview, indicating a missing adjustment or calculation step.

actionable_feedback.action: Attach the reproduce_decision.py run output (console log or CSV of intermediate_calculations_with_row_citations) to the artifacts and include a short reproducibility README describing how to run the script and regenerate all tables.
actionable_feedback.rationale: Verifier could not inspect the YAML and script contents from previews; providing the script output and a README will allow full verification without running code in-place.

actionable_feedback.action: Include direct textual previews or embedded snippets of api_break_rules.yaml and reproduce_decision.py in the artifact preview output (or attach copies to actual_outputs.json) so verifiers can inspect rule definitions and the applied remediation semantics.
actionable_feedback.rationale: Only release_note.md was previewed; full inspectability of machine-readable rule definitions and runnable script improves reproducibility and reduces reviewer assumptions.

actionable_feedback.action: Explicitly state and demonstrate (in the intermediate_calculations CSV or script output) whether remediation options are applied as component-level multiplicative factors, absolute offsets, or other transformations; include examples showing an end-to-end numeric transformation for at least one record.
actionable_feedback.rationale: Verifier recommended clarifying remediation application semantics because mismatches may stem from different interpretations (e.g., multiplicative on component vs. on full score).

actionable_feedback.action: Document numeric rounding rules used for intermediate and final scores and ensure they are applied consistently in both the release_note tables and reproduce_decision.py outputs.
actionable_feedback.rationale: Minor differences in rounding can produce aggregate mismatches; documenting rules prevents confusion.

artifact_specific_comments.comment: Well written and documents assumptions; however, numeric inconsistencies exist between declared formulas, post-mitigation per-record values for R2 and R4, and the reported combination total. Provide intermediate calculation outputs.
Referenced in trace but not previewed. Attach the script output or a minimal run log demonstrating how each table was generated.

raw_llm_output.suggested_revision: Produce 400-revised that (1) corrects per-record post-mitigation arithmetic for R2 and R4, (2) reconciles and documents the combo total aggregation, (3) attaches reproduce_decision.py run outputs (intermediate_calculations CSV) and full previews of api_break_rules.yaml and reproduce_decision.py, and (4) adds a short README showing exact commands to reproduce the results.
trace_specific_comments: Trace indicates reproduce_decision.py run='passed', but verifier could not access its outputs in the preview. Include the run's produced CSV/log in artifacts so the verifier can validate calculations directly.
